returns.reason: Failure reason if canDo is false

cooldownRemaining(address).details: View function to check time until next transfer allowed

returns.isExempt: Whether address is exempt from limits

returns._0: True if circuit breaker is active and not expired

remainingDailyLimit(address).details: View function to check remaining daily allowance

params._maxTransfer: Max tokens per single transfer (0 = disabled)

setBlacklist(address,bool).details: C-1 Fix: Requires freeze period to prevent front-running

params.status: True to blacklist, false to remove

setCircuitBreaker(bool,uint256).details: Can be toggled even if policyLocked is true to ensure livenessCircuit breaker auto-disables after duration to prevent abuse

params._active: True to enable circuit breaker, false to disable
params._duration: Duration in seconds (max 7 days). Ignored when disabling.

params.frozen: True to freeze, false to unfreeze

acceptOwnership().notice: Complete ownership transfer (must be called by pending owner)

canTransfer(address,address,uint256).notice: Check if a transfer can be executed

constructor.notice: Constructor: mint full supply and distribute at genesis

getDailyTransferStats(address).notice: Get daily transfer statistics for a user

getTransferLimitsFor(address).notice: Get comprehensive transfer limits for an address

isCircuitBreakerActive().notice: Check if circuit breaker is currently active (respects expiry)

lockPolicy().notice: One-way switch that makes policy non-optional post-launch.

previewTransferFees(address,address,uint.notice: Preview fees that would be applied to a transfer

setAntiWhale(uint256,uint256,uint256,uin.notice: Set anti-whale limits (set to 0 to disable any limit)

setBlacklist(address,bool).notice: Blacklist an address (must be frozen for FREEZE_DELAY first)

setCircuitBreaker(bool,uint256).notice: Emergency switch to bypass external calls if they fail

setFrozen(address,bool).notice: Freeze an address before blacklisting (prevents front-running)

setSystemExempt(address,bool).notice: Exempt address from all checks (fees + vault-only) - use for system contracts

setWhaleLimitExempt(address,bool).notice: Exempt address from whale limits (for exchanges, liquidity pools, etc.)

setWhitelist(address,bool).notice: Whitelist address to bypass vault-only rule - use for exchanges/DEXs
